waves.description: Contract Freeze / Scaffold - Scaffold minimal TypeScript contract files for fresh ACPX mission execution

work_packets.title: Scaffold mission_types.ts contract
acceptance_criteria: mission_types.ts contains minimal type definitions required for fresh mission creation
Types are aligned with ACPX execution contract expectations
No test harnesses or replay engines included

scaffold_exists:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
missing = [rel for rel in paths if not Path(rel).is_file()]
if missing:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing={missing}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_contract_tokens:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
required = ('export ', 'interface ', 'type ', 'enum ')
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in required):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_contract_tokens={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_schema_surface:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
surface_tokens = (
    'Schema',
    'schema',
    'export interface ',
    'export type ',
    'export const ',
)
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in surface_tokens):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_schema_surface={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_lint_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
issues = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    lines = text.splitlines()
    trailing = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if line.rstrip() != line]
    tabs = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if '\t' in line]
    if trailing:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:trailing_whitespace={trailing}')
    if tabs:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:tabs={tabs}')
    if text and not text.endswith('\n'):
        issues.append(f'{rel}:missing_terminal_newline')
if issues:
    sys.stderr.write('lint_smoke_failed=' + ';'.join(issues) + '\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_import_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import subprocess
import sys
targets = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
import_smoke_path = Path('src/contracts/import_smoke.ts')
import_smoke_path.write_text("import * as contract_1 from './mission_types';\nvoid [contract_1];\n", encoding='utf-8')
command = [
    'tsc',
    '--noEmit',
    '--target', 'es2022',
    '--module', 'esnext',
    '--moduleResolution', 'bundler',
    '--skipLibCheck',
    *targets,
    import_smoke_path.as_posix(),
]
raise SystemExit(subprocess.run(command, check=False).returncode)

work_packets.builder_prompt: Create a minimal mission_types.ts file under src/contracts with essential TypeScript interfaces/types for a fresh ACPX mission. Include only the minimal type definitions needed to scaffold mission creation. Do not include dashboard logic, test harnesses, or replay engine code.

work_packets.title: Scaffold artifact_types.ts contract
acceptance_criteria: artifact_types.ts contains minimal type definitions for round artifacts
Types are aligned with ACPX execution contract expectations
Fresh round artifacts can be produced using these definitions

scaffold_exists:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/artifact_types.ts']
missing = [rel for rel in paths if not Path(rel).is_file()]

work_packets.builder_prompt: Create a minimal artifact_types.ts file under src/contracts with essential TypeScript interfaces/types for fresh round artifacts. Include only the minimal type definitions needed to produce round artifacts for fresh execution proof. Do not include dashboard logic, test harnesses, or replay engine code.
